description: Backup and restore scope matrix for GrantLayer data categories. This is a design artifact; no backup, restore, or storage is implemented.

dataCategories.backupNotes: Core business data. Must be included in every product backup.
dataCategories.restoreNotes: Restored as part of full product restore or point-in-time restore.

dataCategories.backupNotes: Core business data. Includes signatures and state.
dataCategories.restoreNotes: Restored as part of full product restore or point-in-time restore.

dataCategories.backupNotes: Records of what happened when a grant was used.
dataCategories.restoreNotes: Restored with product records. Must preserve linkage to grants.

dataCategories.backupNotes: Metadata and verification results for evidence.
dataCategories.restoreNotes: Restored with product records. Payload references preserved, not payloads.

dataCategories.backupNotes: References to external storage. Payloads backed up by storage adapter.
dataCategories.restoreNotes: References restored; payloads restored via evidence storage adapter.

dataCategories.backupNotes: Append-only cryptographic chain. Must survive any restore event.
dataCategories.restoreNotes: Must be verified after restore. Prefer immutable append-only storage over snapshot restore.
Must not overwrite existing audit records. Append-only restoration.

dataCategories.backupNotes: Policy evaluation outcomes per grant or request.
Reproducible from product and policy data. Optional backup.
dataCategories.restoreNotes: Can be regenerated from restored product and policy data.

dataCategories.backupNotes: Should be reproducible from deployment artifacts and secrets.
dataCategories.restoreNotes: Preferred approach is rebuild from validated source, not restore from backup.

dataCategories.backupNotes: Ephemeral. May be streamed to log aggregation. Not a restore priority.
dataCategories.restoreNotes: Not restored. Systems generate new logs from current time forward.

dataCategories.backupNotes: MUST NOT be stored in ordinary backups unless future secret-management policy explicitly allows it.
dataCategories.restoreNotes: Recovered via approved secret-management procedures (secret manager, HSM, etc.), not from backup.

metadata.note: No backup, restore, or storage implementation exists. This matrix defines intended scope for future implementation.
